DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: A P P E A R A N C E S:
Jordan Eth, Esq. and Dorothy J. Fernandez, Esq. of MORRISON & FOERSTER 268-7000 for defendants BESSEMER TRUST COMPANY, N.A. and ROBERT G. VANNEMAN demurring party
Alan W. Sparer, Esq. and David R. Lawson, Esq. of HOWARD, RICE 434-1600 for Plaintiff ROBERT F. FLOOD opposing the demurrer
This matter was heard at the same time as Case No. 401906 on Department 302's calendar.
The demurrer and motion to strikee was argued and the Court ruled as follows:
Moton to strike as to punitive damages is granted with leave to amend with further specificity. As to the demurrer -- 1st Cause of Action overruled. 2nd Cause of ACtion overruled. 3rd Cause of Action overruled. 4th Cause of Action for breach of oral contract sustained with leave to amend as to VANNEMAN. 5th Cause of Action, B & P 17,200 claim -- sustained as to VANNEMAN and overruled as to the business entity. 6th Cause of Action sustained with leave to amend. 20 days leave to amend. (JJM/CL) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
